dashboard.package_required: You need a package to access this feature.
dashboard.unlock_full_access: Unlock full access! Purchase a package to view details and send requests.
dashboard.logout_confirm_msg: Are you sure you want to sign out of your account? You will need to log in again to access your dashboard.
dashboard.welcome_back: Welcome back to your dashboard. You have {{matchCount}} active matches and {{requestCount}} pending requests today.

featured.compatible_msg: You have a highly compatible mutual transfer match. Start a request to view contact details and initialize the official process.

empty.increase_msg: Add more hospital preferences to increase your chances of finding a 2-way or 3-way match.

pro.active_msg: Your premium features are active. You can extend your duration anytime to keep enjoying the benefits.
pro.upgrade_msg: Experience unlimited matching, real-time alerts, and advanced profile statistics.

guide.title: Getting Started Guide
guide.subtitle: Complete these steps to unlock the full potential of Mutual Transfer.
guide.step1_desc: Specify your desired transfer locations to find potential partners.
guide.step2_desc: Review the direct and chain transfer opportunities found for you.
guide.step3_desc: Initiate a transfer cycle by sending a request to a match.
guide.step4_desc: Review and accept incoming transfer requests from other users.
guide.step5_desc: Communicate with your confirmed partners to finalize details.

messages.title: Messages
messages.select_convo_desc: Connect with transfer partners to discuss your mutual transfer arrangements.

preferences.title: Transfer Preferences
preferences.subtitle: Rank your target stations by priority to optimize matching.
preferences.reorder_hint: Drag and drop to reorder your prioritized list
preferences.no_prefs_subtitle: You haven't added any hospitals to your transfer preferences. Click the button below to start building your list.
preferences.info_desc: Our algorithm heavily prioritizes finding matches for your #1 ranked station. It will look for direct, 3-way, and complex routes.
preferences.prob_hint: Selecting multiple stations increases match probability by up to 45%.
preferences.exclude_hint: Your current station is automatically excluded from Discovery.
preferences.discover_subtitle: Find and add hospitals to your preference list
preferences.no_results_subtitle: We couldn't find any stations matching your search criteria.
preferences.remove_confirm_msg: Are you sure you want to remove this station from your preferences? This action cannot be undone.

requests.title: Match Requests
requests.subtitle: Manage your incoming and outgoing transfer requests.

settings.title: Account Settings
settings.subtitle: Manage your security preferences and automated notifications.
settings.instant_match_desc: Notify me immediately when a direct match is found.
settings.instant_message_desc: Get browser notifications when you receive a new message.
settings.cycle_detection_desc: Alert me when I part of a detected multi-way loop.
settings.system_updates_desc: Receive news regarding regional station changes.
settings.public_profile_desc: Allow other medical officers to see my current station.
settings.regional_discovery_desc: Show my profile in local station-based searches.
settings.dark_mode_on_desc: Light out. High contrast mode active.

profile.nic_auth_desc: System-level identification completed via Department for Registration of Persons.
profile.phone_verify_success: Mobile number ({{phone}}) verified via secure SMS OTP.
profile.phone_verify_pending: Complete Level 2 by verifying your mobile number to enable real-time match alerts.
profile.otp_modal_desc: We've sent a 6-digit verification code to your phone. Please enter it below.
profile.logout_msg: Are you sure you want to sign out of your account? You will need to log in again to access your dashboard.
profile.not_found: Profile not found. Please log in again.

home.hero_subtitle: Sri Lanka's most trusted transfer platform for government employees in Sri Lanka.
home.how_it_works_subtitle: Our intelligent matching engine does the heavy lifting. Register, set your preferences, and let our algorithm find your perfect transfer match.
home.step1_desc: Create your account with NIC verification. Set up your professional profile in minutes.
home.step2_desc: Choose your desired stations, districts, and transfer preferences for pinpoint matching.
home.step3_desc: Our DFS algorithm finds direct and circular matches automatically. Accept with one click.
home.features_subtitle: We replace traditional notice boards and social media groups with a data-driven matching engine tailored for Sri Lanka.
home.feat_large_desc: Our proprietary algorithm discovers complex 3-way circular transfer chains (A → B → C → A) that are humanly impossible to detect. Visualize your path to a new station.
home.feat1_desc: Process thousands of professional requirements in milliseconds to find direct shifts.
home.feat2_desc: NIC and Email validation ensures only legitimate government personnel access the system.
home.feat3_desc: A centralized hub for Teachers, Nurses, and Doctors across all 25 districts.
home.feat4_desc: Drill down through Province, District, and Hospital level vacancies with precision.
home.feat5_desc: 98% data accuracy ensures your match is valid and ready for official processing.
home.testimonials_subtitle: Real stories from government employees across Sri Lanka who find their perfect transfer match.
home.pricing_subtitle: Select the plan that best fits your transfer goals.
home.cta_title: Ready to Find Your Perfect Transfer?
home.cta_subtitle: Join thousands of government employees who have already found their ideal station match on MutualTransfer.lk.
home.testimonial1_quote: MutualTransfer.lk found me a 3-way circular match in just 2 days. What would have taken months through notice boards happened in hours.
home.testimonial2_quote: The verified profiles gave me confidence. I knew every match was genuine. Best decision I made for my career transfer.

login.subtitle: Login with your government service ID
login.error_invalid_nic: Please enter a valid Sri Lankan NIC number (9 digits + V or 12 digits)
login.error_admin_portal: Please use the dedicated Admin Portal to log in.
login.error_failed: Login failed. Please check your credentials.
login.error_nic_required: Please enter a valid Sri Lankan NIC number first.

register.sidebar_subtitle: Register with your official details to start matching with potential transfer partners.
register.otp_sent_to: We've sent a 6-digit verification code to
register.otp_instruction: Please enter it below to verify your account.
register.error_invalid_nic: Please enter a valid Sri Lankan NIC number (9 digits + V or 12 digits)
register.error_verify_failed: OTP verification failed. Please try again.

matches.title: Potential Matches
matches.subtitle: All direct and multi-way transfer opportunities found for you.
matches.preferences_desc: Matching your professional profile with active requests.
matches.no_matches: No matches found for current filters.
